subject: Your Turkish Airlines Booking Confirmation - TK1234
body:
Dear Demo User,

Thank you for choosing Turkish Airlines. Your booking is confirmed.

Booking reference (PNR): TK-ABC123
E-ticket number: 235-4498217603

Flight details:
Flight TK1234
Istanbul (IST) -> New York (JFK)
Departure: 10:30 local time
Class: Economy
Passenger: Demo User
Seat: 24C

Please arrive at Istanbul Airport at least 3 hours before departure for international check-in. You can check in online starting 24 hours before your flight at turkishairlines.com or via the Turkish Airlines mobile app.

Baggage allowance: 1 checked bag up to 23kg, 1 cabin bag up to 8kg.

If you need to make changes to your booking, please visit Manage Booking on our website and enter your PNR TK-ABC123.

We look forward to welcoming you on board.

Turkish Airlines Reservations Team

subject: Fly to 300+ destinations - Summer sale
body:
Summer is here and so are our best fares of the season!

Discover Turkish Airlines' network of 300+ destinations across 6 continents. Book now and save up to 20% on select routes departing from Istanbul.

Highlights:
- Nonstop flights to over 40 European cities
- New seasonal routes to the Mediterranean coast
- Miles&Smiles members earn double miles this month

Sale ends soon. Fares shown are round trip, taxes and fees included. Terms and conditions apply.

Explore destinations and book at turkishairlines.com.

Happy travels,
Turkish Airlines

subject: Excited to kick off our partnership
body:
Hi,

I'm Sarah Chen, VP of Partnerships at Acme Corp. It was great connecting last week, and I'm excited to formally kick off our partnership discussions.

On our end, the goal is to put together a proposal that covers integration scope, timeline, and commercial terms for Q3. I'll start pulling together a first draft over the next couple of weeks and will loop you in for feedback before we finalize anything.

In the meantime, let me know if there's anyone else on your side I should be looping in, or any specific priorities you'd like the proposal to address.

Looking forward to working together.

Best,
Sarah Chen
VP Partnerships, Acme Corp

subject: Re: Acme Corp partnership - Q3 proposal
body:
Hi,

Following up on our kickoff conversation - I've put together the first full draft of the Q3 proposal, attached as "Acme Corp Proposal v3".

A few things I'd like your eyes on specifically:
1. The integration timeline in section 2 - is 8 weeks realistic on your side?
2. The pricing tiers in section 4 - we landed on three tiers based on usage volume.
3. The support SLA language in section 5.

If everything looks reasonable, I'd like to walk through it together and get sign-off before end of quarter. Let me know your availability.

Thanks,
Sarah

subject: Agenda for tomorrow's Quarterly Review
body:
Hi,

Looking forward to the Quarterly Review tomorrow. Here's the agenda I'd like to cover:

1. Q3 proposal sign-off - finalize scope and pricing
2. Budget review - confirm allocation for the integration work
3. Timeline - lock the 8-week rollout plan and key milestones
4. Next steps - assign owners and set the next check-in date

Should take about an hour. Let me know if you'd like to add anything else.

See you then,
Sarah

subject: Sprint planning notes
body:
Hey,

Notes from today's sprint planning:

- Carrying over the search relevance work from last sprint, should wrap by Wednesday
- New ticket for the API integration timeline with Acme - needs an estimate
- Auth service migration is blocked on the infra team, following up separately
- Two bugs from QA triaged as high priority, assigned to me

Let me know if I mis-captured anything from your side.

John

subject: Re: API integration timeline
body:
Hey,

Circling back on this - do we have firm dates yet for the API integration work? Sarah's team is asking because it feeds into the proposal timeline they're finalizing.

If we can get a start date and rough estimate for the milestones, I can block time on the engineering side and get a kickoff on the calendar.

Thanks,
John

subject: Q3 Budget approval needed
body:
Hi,

The Q3 Budget.xlsx spreadsheet is ready for your review and approval. Key items to note:

- Engineering headcount allocation increased by 2 FTEs
- New line item for the Acme Corp partnership integration costs
- Travel and offsite budget flat vs. Q2

Please review the attached spreadsheet and confirm approval by end of week so we can lock the numbers before the quarterly review.

Thanks,
Finance Team

subject: [org/repo] Pull request #482: fix retry backoff in worker pool
body:
alex-dev requested your review on pull request #482 in org/repo.

fix retry backoff in worker pool

This PR fixes an issue where the exponential backoff in the worker pool was resetting incorrectly after a partial failure, causing excessive retries under load.

View the pull request to leave a review or merge.

You are receiving this because your review was requested.

subject: Your weekly LinkedIn digest: 12 new updates from your network
body:

Stay in touch and see what's new by visiting your LinkedIn feed.

subject: All-hands meeting next Friday + new benefits rollout
body:
Hi everyone,

A couple of updates:

1. All-hands meeting is next Friday at 4pm. We'll cover the Q2 wrap-up, product roadmap highlights, and a Q&A with leadership.
2. New benefits enrollment window opens Monday - updated dental and vision plans are now available. Details in the benefits portal.

See you at the all-hands!

People Team

subject: Call for Proposals: DevSummit 2026 is now open
body:
The call for proposals for DevSummit 2026 is officially open!

We're looking for talks on distributed systems, developer tooling, AI-assisted engineering, and platform reliability. Selected speakers receive a free conference pass and travel stipend.

Submission deadline: 6 weeks from today.

Submit your talk abstract (250 words or less) through our CFP portal.

We can't wait to see what you're working on.

DevSummit Organizing Committee

subject: Reset your password
body:
We received a request to reset the password for your account.

If you made this request, click the link below to choose a new password. This link will expire in 30 minutes.

If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email - your password will not be changed.

For security reasons, this request was logged with the IP address and timestamp of the request.

Account Security Team

subject: Team lunch this Thursday?
body:
Hey folks,

It's been a while since we all got lunch together. Thinking Thursday around 12:30 at the new ramen place near the office. Let me know if that works or if another day is better.

Can add more people if you want to invite others from the team.

Maria
